_publications._publicationTitle: Cell-free DNA ultra-low-pass whole genome sequencing to distinguish malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor (MPNST) from its benign precursor lesion: A cross-sectional study.

_contextSnippet: Notably, AUC decreased to 0.60 when considering all cfDNA fragment sizes, highlighting the importance of our in silico size selection step
details: AUC decreased to 0.60 when considering all cfDNA fragment sizes, highlighting importance of in silico size selection step
